progress_summary: Weekly retrospective token+cost audit of all Claude Code work on opchain. Scanned 1,546 transcripts, matched 534 by cwd (39 sessions + workflow subagents across ~27 worktree folders); deduped 10,560 raw assistant lines to 4317 unique message.id records (streaming-snapshot collapse avoids ~2.1x output inflation), then append-safe merged with 214 preserved historical rows whose transcripts have rotated off disk. 614,715,457 tokens for $1,041.74 over 2026-05-26 -> 2026-07-14. Fable 5 is 60.8% of spend; cache-reads are 93% of tokens but a small slice of cost. Spend concentrated: PR #376 alone is 26% of total. 9 PRs diverge >20% between per-message and session-dominant attribution. Full tables in reports/token-usage/token-report-2026-07-14.md.
next_actions: Cut real semver v* tags earlier in the cycle — the by-release breakdown is still degenerate (59% of spend predates the first tag as 'unreleased').
Investigate PR #376 (largest single-PR spend, 25.5% of total; the pensive-hawking Fable-5 workflow run) for prompt/caching regressions.
~42% of fresh cache-write tokens are 1h-TTL (priced 2x). If that ratio is unintended, review where 1h cache_control is being set — 5m default is cheaper for interactive work.
Re-run weekly; fact table is append-safe on message_id. Next run will preserve today's rows once these transcripts rotate off.

skill_state.note: cost.tokens carries only fresh input/output per wire-1.1. Cache buckets (read 568,652,505, write 33,044,757; write split 5m x1.25 / 1h x2.0) are priced into total_usd and detailed in aggregates.json.
skill_state.budget_usd: unset — retrospective analysis, no budget ceiling (key omitted from cost: validator rejects null)

progress_table.label: Parse + dedupe on message.id (max per bucket)
Attribute by model / chat / PR (2 modes) / release
Append-safe merge with prior fact table (214 preserved)
Emit report + CSV + aggregates + meta + dashboard export

key_decisions: Manifest built by scanning every line for cwd (grep -m1), not `head -1` — the spec's head-1 filter drops sessions whose first record lacks cwd (queue-op/started/ai-title).
Rows keyed on message.id with MAX per token bucket: streaming writes the same id 2-3x with a growing output_tokens; per-line counting overstates output ~2.1x.
Cache-write priced per TTL from usage.cache_creation (1.25x for 5m, 2.0x for 1h), not flat 1.25x — ~42% of fresh cache-writes are 1h.
Fact table merged append-safe on message_id: 214 prior rows (2026-05-26..06-06) preserved because their transcripts have rotated off disk.
claude-opus-4-7 / claude-sonnet-4-6 appear only in preserved history; their cost is carried at the prior epoch, not re-derived (absent from current model-routing.md rate table).
cost.budget_usd omitted (not null) — scripts/checkpoint.mjs validator rejects null.
user_preferences: Keep the four token buckets separate everywhere; never merge cache-read into fresh input.
